message:
refactor: simplify hour hook and improve MDX path resolution

three-scene.tsx:
- Use lazy useState initializer for hour since component is ssr: false
- Remove unnecessary hydrationId timeout workaround
- Simplify cleanup to just clearInterval

lib/mdx.ts:
- Add process.cwd() + content/writing as first path to check
- Standard Next.js pattern for content resolution
- Improves compatibility with different deployment environments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
